text: Effective team management requires balancing several key skills. First, clear communication ensures everyone understands their roles and project goals without confusion. Delegation is equally important: assigning tasks based on team members' strengths increases efficiency and builds trust. Regular feedback, both positive and constructive, helps people improve and feel valued. To maintain motivation, recognize achievements and connect daily work to larger objectives. Finally, conflict resolution is crucial. When disagreements arise, address them promptly by listening to all perspectives and finding fair solutions. By focusing on these areas, you can create a productive and positive team environment where everyone contributes their best.
